general/Analysis/comparative-analysis.title: Comparative Analysis
general/Analysis/comparative-analysis.description: Comparative analysis in PromptBio allows you to compare gene expression, protein levels, or other biological measurements across two or more groups.

general/Analysis/differential-analysis.title: Differential Analysis
general/Analysis/differential-analysis.description: Differential analysis identifies features (genes, proteins, metabolites) that are statistically significantly different between two conditions.

general/Analysis/functional-enrichment.title: Functional Enrichment
general/Analysis/functional-enrichment.description: Functional enrichment analysis helps you understand the biological meaning behind a list of significant genes or proteins by mapping them to known pathways and gene ontology (GO) terms.

general/Analysis/multi-group-comparison.title: Multi-Group Comparison
general/Analysis/multi-group-comparison.description: Multi-group comparison extends differential analysis to handle three or more groups simultaneously, using ANOVA-like approaches for biological data.

general/Analysis/single-cell-clustering.title: Single-Cell Clustering
general/Analysis/single-cell-clustering.description: Single-cell clustering groups individual cells by their expression profiles to identify distinct cell populations within your dataset.

general/Data/data-overview.title: Data Management
general/Data/data-overview.description: This section explains how to upload, format, and manage your biological data in PromptBio.

general/general-overview.title: General Documentation
general/general-overview.description: This section contains high-level guides for all PromptBio modules. Choose a module below to get started.

general/Home/getting-started.title: Getting Started
general/Home/getting-started.description: Welcome! This guide walks you through everything you need to start analyzing biological data in PromptBio.

general/MarkerGenie/markergenie-overview.title: MarkerGenie Overview
general/MarkerGenie/markergenie-overview.description: MarkerGenie automates biomarker discovery by combining statistical testing, machine learning, and biological database lookups to identify the most meaningful features in your dataset.

general/MLGenie/mlgenie-overview.title: MLGenie Overview
general/MLGenie/mlgenie-overview.description: MLGenie is PromptBio's machine learning module that enables you to build, train, and evaluate predictive models on biological datasets — no coding required.

general/NotebookGenie/notebookgenie-over.title: NotebookGenie Overview
general/NotebookGenie/notebookgenie-over.description: NotebookGenie generates ready-to-run Jupyter notebooks from your PromptBio analyses. It lets bioinformaticians take any analysis run inside PromptBio and export it as reproducible, annotated Python code.

general/Omics/omics-overview.title: Omics Overview
general/Omics/omics-overview.description: The Omics module in PromptBio allows you to integrate and analyze data across multiple biological layers — genomics, transcriptomics, proteomics, and metabolomics — in a single workflow.

general/Project/project-overview.title: Project Management
general/Project/project-overview.description: Projects are the top-level workspace in PromptBio. All your data, analyses, and results are organized within a project.

general/Workflow/workflow-overview.title: Workflow Overview
general/Workflow/workflow-overview.description: Workflows let you chain multiple PromptBio analyses together into a single automated pipeline. Instead of running each step manually, you define the steps once and run them end-to-end.

intro.title: Welcome to PromptBio Wiki
intro.description: PromptBio is a platform for biological data analysis powered by AI. This wiki covers everything you need to get started — from project setup to advanced analysis workflows.

technical/api-reference.title: API Reference
technical/api-reference.description: The PromptBio REST API lets you programmatically interact with projects, data, and analyses.

technical/technical-overview.title: Technical Documentation
technical/technical-overview.description: This section covers the technical internals of PromptBio — API references, architecture details, and integration guides for developers.

workbook/tutorial-differential-analysis.title: Tutorial 1: Your First Differential Analysis
workbook/tutorial-differential-analysis.description: In this tutorial you will analyze a bulk RNA-seq dataset comparing cancer vs. normal tissue samples and identify differentially expressed genes.

workbook/workbook-overview.title: Workbook Tutorials
workbook/workbook-overview.description: The Workbook section contains end-to-end tutorials using real example datasets. Each tutorial walks you through a complete analysis from raw data to final results.
